prompt: When depth synthesis removes pressure edge, choose fold.
why_v1: Fold preserves chips when stack depth and pressure no longer justify continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits when the depth synthesis says the leverage edge is gone and preserving chips wins.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is better when the depth synthesis removes your leverage and the remaining stack no longer supports a profitable continue. Once the edge is thin and future pressure is gone, preserving chips beats stretching the hand.
